steps.t: Erebor can be found in the north of the Dale-lands. You should travel to Erebor.
Mazalu Ugshar, The Scholar's Abode can be found in Erebor. You should seek out Mazalu Ugshar.
Glóthin can be found in Erebor. You should talk to Glóthin.
Mazalu Ugshar can be found in Erebor. You should search The Scholar's Abode for Grár's Key.
Náin can be found in Járnfast. You should return to Náin.
The entrance to the Howling Pit can be found beyond the last mithril door, deep within Járnfast. You should seek the entrance of the Howling Pit.
The entrance to the Howling Pit can be found beyond the last mithril door, deep within Járnfast. You should examine the entrance of the Howling Pit.
Náin can be found next to the Howling Pit. You should talk to Náin.
